TestCase z4Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    if (t1.n1 > 0) {
        double* follow_case_a = (double*)malloc(t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
        if (follow_case_a != NULL) {
            memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
            follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
        }
    }
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive programming: check if array length > 0 before processing
    if (follow_case.n1 <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific transformation: divide all non-zero elements by 2.0
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n1; i++) {
        if (follow_case.a[i] != 0.0) {
            follow_case.a[i] = follow_case.a[i] / 2.0;
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
